description: Tokens curated to suppress false-positive seed_corpus_conflict items when the conflict source is incidental substring matching. Does NOT affect scoring, taxonomy, aliases, or any compiled artifact.

raw.rationale: Incidental substring. raw (cru) has no semantic relation to strawberry (morango).

grain.rationale: Incidental substring. grain (grão) has no semantic relation to petitgrain (botanical proper name).

black.rationale: Color qualifier, not an olfactory descriptor. Incidental substring of blackberry.

peel.rationale: Generic botanical part. Incidental substring of lemon_peel.

leaf.rationale: Generic botanical part. Incidental substring of tomato_leaf.

sweet.rationale: Adjective/qualifier, not a note name. Incidental substring of sweet_orange. Already downweighted (0.25) in semantic_noise.v1.json.

bitter.rationale: Adjective/qualifier, not a note name. Incidental substring of bitter_orange.

fruit.rationale: Generic category. Incidental substring of grapefruit (no semantic relation fruit→grapefruit).

berry.rationale: Generic category. Incidental substring of blackberry.

wood.rationale: Generic material category. Incidental substring of cedarwood. Already covered indirectly by woody (0.25) downweight.

orange.rationale: Legitimate olfactory note (orange/laranja), but NOT a current seed descriptor. Conflict with bitter_orange and sweet_orange is incidental substring match. Include conditionally — revisit if orange is proposed for seed promotion.

apple.rationale: Legitimate olfactory note (apple/maçã), but NOT a current seed descriptor. Conflict with pineapple is incidental (pineapple = abacaxi ≠ maçã). Include conditionally — revisit if apple is proposed for seed promotion.

pine.rationale: Legitimate olfactory note (pine/pinus), but NOT a current seed descriptor. Conflict with pineapple is incidental. Include conditionally — revisit if pine is proposed for seed promotion.
